title: vRXp
description: Good Experience on VR And Non-VR
body:
### **vRXp**
(Virtual Reality Experience) Is a Very Fun And Challenging modpack.
You can play this ModPack with friends or by yourself.
You Can Make Your challenges and Try To Beat them in under a Certain Time' you know as they say **"The Only Limit Is your Imagination"** 
So hop on With a Friend and Have A Fantastic Day.

   
# 
### **Q&A**
- **What Is Our Goal?**    
Our goal is to make the best Minecraft experience for all Ages!

 
### **If You Have Any Issue or Any Question Pls Tell Us in Our Discord Server.**
